response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform work; their resume emphasizes TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal C++ exposure, and they have no documented leadership experience in cloud or distributed systems mentoring, making them a poor fit for the technical lead role.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven experience building scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience shown, far below the 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering mentoring
